reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para pasar el día, esta muy bien cuidado, deberían tener alguna promoción para grupos familiares numerosos.

(Translated by Google)
Lovely place to spend the day, it's very well maintained, they should have some kind of promotion for large family groups.

reviews.comment:
Paré para tomar un cafe y no hay diario tampoco hay wifi y el café es de maquina expendedora..... Y para colmo tampoco hay televisión..... cero servicio....

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for a coffee and there's no newspaper, no Wi-Fi, and the coffee is from a vending machine... And to top it all off, there's no television either... Zero service...

reviews.comment:
ACA Luján; hice combustible de mañana y de tarde descanso, MUY BUENA ATENCIÓN tanto en el surtidor como en TODOS los sevicios; cantina, pequeño bufé, las llaves de los sanitarios se retiran allí  y quiero hacer una mención especial por su limpieza.
Hay agua caliente gratis y tienen TODOS los servicios al viajero. Lugar de paso que es bueno tener en cuenta para un breve respiro reparador y confortable sobre Ruta 7 km 62.100..

(Translated by Google)
ACA Luján; I filled up in the morning and rested in the afternoon. The service was excellent, both at the pump and throughout the restrooms: the canteen, the small buffet, and the restroom keys are available for pickup. I want to give a special mention for its cleanliness. There's free hot water and they offer all the amenities a traveler could need. It's a good place to stop for a short, relaxing, and comfortable break on Route 7 at kilometer 62.100.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNemRtdmVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Parque amplio, muy arbolado. Piletas limpias.  La mantención del lugar es excelente.  Esta lleno de ardillas.

(Translated by Google)
Large, wooded park. Clean pools. Excellent maintenance. Full of squirrels.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNdXJqeWRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, ideal para aprovechar para un break entre Lujan y Rodríguez, por la noche se debería mejorar la iluminación, aunque el estado de la ruta de lamentable, incluso de noche hay tramos a oscuras y con cráteres. Lo mejor? La YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, ideal for a break between Luján and Rodríguez. The lighting should be improved at night, although the road is in deplorable condition; even at night there are sections that are dark and full of potholes. The best thing? The YPF gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNOHNMcFdREAE

reviews.comment:
Todos los 8 de diciembre hacemos un asado con mi familia para celebrar la vida, nos juntamos con todos los primos. Excelente la limpieza y el cuidado del club

(Translated by Google)
Every December 8th, my family and I have a barbecue to celebrate life; we get together with all our cousins. The club is excellently clean and well-maintained.
